# kemp_sub_virtual_service (Resource)

Manages a Sub-Virtual Service (SubVS) under a parent `kemp_virtual_service`.

A SubVS shares the parent's listening address/port/protocol and adds L7 routing on top — typically used to dispatch traffic by host/path to different real-server pools. Sub-VS creation goes through the parent's `modvs` with `createsubvs`; thereafter the SubVS has its own Index used for CRUD.

The SubVS exposes the same SSL + ESP + WAF surface as the parent `kemp_virtual_service` resource — a SubVS can carry its own auth config and WAF posture independently of its siblings.

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "kemp_virtual_service" "frontend" {
  address          = "10.0.0.100"
  port             = "443"
  protocol         = "tcp"
  type             = "http"
  ssl_acceleration = true
  cert_files       = [kemp_certificate.wildcard.name]
}

resource "kemp_certificate" "wildcard" {
  name = "wildcard"
  data = base64encode(file("${path.module}/cert.pem"))
}

resource "kemp_sub_virtual_service" "api" {
  parent_id = kemp_virtual_service.frontend.id
  nickname  = "api-tier"
  enabled   = true

  esp_enabled         = true
  esp_input_auth_mode = "form"
}

resource "kemp_sub_virtual_service" "static" {
  parent_id = kemp_virtual_service.frontend.id
  nickname  = "static-assets"
  enabled   = true
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `parent_id` (String) `Index` of the parent virtual service this SubVS attaches to.

### Optional

- `cert_files` (List of String) Names of certificates attached to this SubVS (multiple entries enable SNI).
- `enabled` (Boolean)
- `esp_allowed_directories` (String)
- `esp_allowed_hosts` (String)
- `esp_display_pub_priv` (Boolean)
- `esp_enabled` (Boolean) Enable Edge Security Pack on this SubVS.
- `esp_include_nested_groups` (Boolean)
- `esp_input_auth_mode` (String)
- `esp_logs` (Boolean)
- `esp_output_auth_mode` (String)
- `nickname` (String) Friendly name shown in the WUI.
- `ssl_acceleration` (Boolean) Enable SSL/TLS termination on this SubVS.
- `type` (String) VS type — `gen`, `http`, `http2`, `ts`, `tls`, `log`.
- `waf_alert_threshold` (Number)
- `waf_blocking_paranoia` (Number)
- `waf_intercept_mode` (String) WAF intercept mode: `0` off / `1` Legacy / `2` OWASP.

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) LoadMaster `Index` assigned to the SubVS.

## Import

Import is supported using the following syntax:

The [`terraform import` command](https://developer.hashicorp.com/terraform/cli/commands/import) can be used, for example:

```shell
# Import format: <parent_virtual_service_index>/<subvs_index>
terraform import kemp_sub_virtual_service.example 5/8
```
